aboutMetaDesc: MGH - Official association of classified guest houses and riads of Marrakech, Essaouira and Ouarzazate. Direct booking for authentic and equitable tourism.
aboutIntro1: We are MGH (Moroccan Guest Houses), the OFFICIAL association of classified guest houses and riads of Marrakech, Essaouira and Ouarzazate — field professionals, committed to authentic and equitable tourism.
aboutIntro2: We have created for you the official direct booking platform for classified riads and guest houses of Marrakech, Essaouira and Ouarzazate, LA CENTRALE DES RIADS.
aboutSection1Title: An initiative driven by the hoteliers themselves
aboutSection1Text: LA CENTRALE DES RIADS is not a platform created by an international group or a financial entity. It was born at the initiative of the official association of classified guest houses and riads of Marrakech, Essaouira and Ouarzazate, with a simple ambition: to restore a direct and personal relationship between the traveler and their host, for more equitable and more human tourism.
aboutSection2Text1: Here, no intermediary, no platform with ever-increasing commissions. Here you deal directly with the owners and operators of the establishments. This direct relationship allows us to offer more advantageous rates, more flexible conditions and special touches often absent from traditional platforms.
aboutSection2Text2: Booking direct means rediscovering a simple, human and transparent relationship.
aboutSection3Title: Authentic places, far from standardized offerings
aboutSection3Text: Each riad and guest house listed on LA CENTRALE DES RIADS has its own identity, history and atmosphere. Our selection highlights establishments of character, devoted to the Moroccan art of hospitality and sincere welcome. Here each stay is conceived as an encounter, not as a mere standardized booking.
aboutBanner: Here you book cheaper and with better conditions
aboutCard1Intro: By booking directly with the establishments:
aboutCard1Bullet1: you deal with the actual owners and operators
aboutCard1Bullet3: you benefit from more advantageous rates
aboutCard1Bullet4: you enjoy more flexible conditions (cancellation, complimentary services…)
aboutCard1Bullet5: you access exclusive services or special touches
aboutCard1Footer: A win-win relationship, simpler and more advantageous for everyone.
aboutCard2Text: Each establishment listed on LA CENTRALE DES RIADS is a guest house or riad officially classified, a member of our professional association. A guarantee of seriousness, compliance and quality to book with confidence.
aboutCard3Text: Booking direct often means more advantageous rates, more flexible conditions and personalized contact with your host. Advice, special requests, trip planning: the exchange is simpler, more direct and more human.
aboutCard4Text: By booking direct, a greater share of your budget genuinely benefits the establishments that welcome you and the local economy. A more equitable, more transparent and more human way to travel in Morocco.
aboutCard5Text: Each riad and guest house has its own identity, history and atmosphere. Far from standardized accommodations, LA CENTRALE DES RIADS highlights places of character and deeply Moroccan hospitality.
aboutCard6Title: Travel More Local, More Human, More Real
aboutCard6Text: We believe that a stay in a riad or guest house should not be a standardized experience. Morocco is also discovered through encounters, homes, neighborhoods, hosts' advice, personalized touches and the soul of the place. This is the hospitality we want to preserve and promote.
